Row.Text: A civilization led by Akane Kurokawa. Centered on the LALALAI Troupe and Stage Actors, it uses performances, district synergy, and role switching to spread cultural strength into faith, science, production, and combat.

Akane Kurokawa excels at reading the stage and understanding roles. By switching among Hoshino Ai, Sayahime, and Hoshino Ruby, she can redirect cultural, faith, science, production, and combat strengths to whatever the moment demands.

The LALALAI Troupe increases the building yields of adjacent Campuses, Commercial Hubs, Harbors, Encampments, Industrial Zones, and Holy Sites by +50%. Adjacent Campuses, Commercial Hubs, Harbors, Encampments, and Holy Sites also gain matching Great Person points, and those points continue to scale with those districts' building tiers.

Akane Kurokawa has the "Reasoning Master" trait: She gains a player-wide flat +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture; each Great Person retirement grants a random Eureka; after researching Mathematics, gain +10% [ICON_Science] Science, and after researching Scientific Theory, gain another +10% [ICON_Science] Science. She can also switch among Hoshino Ai, Sayahime, and Hoshino Ruby. Each switch immediately redirects her bonuses (10-turn cooldown on Standard speed) and grants +16% to all yields for half of the current game-speed cooldown duration.

Unique district replacing the Theater Square. Provides a base +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture and +2 Amenities. Each adjacent City Center grants +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture and an additional +2 [ICON_Gold] Gold; each adjacent Wonder grants +2 [ICON_Culture] Culture and an additional +2 [ICON_Gold] Gold. Adjacent Commercial Hubs and Harbors gain +2 [ICON_Gold] Gold, Campuses gain +1 [ICON_Science] Science, Entertainment Complexes and Water Parks gain +2 [ICON_Production] Production, Encampments and Industrial Zones gain +1 [ICON_Production] Production, and Holy Sites gain +1 [ICON_Faith] Faith. Specialists in this district also provide +2 [ICON_Food] Food and +1 [ICON_Production] Production each.

Akane's unique civilian unit with 3 performance charges. Each performance can be held at an owned LALALAI Troupe in one of your cities, once per city; after performing, that city's LALALAI Troupe and its adjacent specialty districts permanently have their adjacency yields doubled. If the city has an Amphitheater, Art Museum, Archaeological Museum, or Broadcast Center, each completed building also provides +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture, and each such building increases the city's Tourism by +20%. The unit retires after the final performance.

Perform at this owned LALALAI Troupe. Consumes 1 performance charge ({1_num} remaining). Each city can host only one performance. This city's LALALAI Troupe and its adjacent Campuses, Commercial Hubs, Harbors, Entertainment Complexes, Water Parks, Encampments, Industrial Zones, and Holy Sites permanently have their adjacency yields doubled. If this city has an Amphitheater, Art Museum, Archaeological Museum, or Broadcast Center, each completed building also provides +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture, and each such building increases the city's Tourism by +20%. Also triggers stackable empire-wide Art Prosperity. This unit is removed only after its final performance.
[ICON_Culture] Stage performance reward applied. This unit has {1_num} performance(s) remaining. Empire-wide Art Prosperity is active: {2_num} stack(s), {3_num} turn(s) remaining.
Akane mode switching is ready again.

Adopt Hoshino Ai's role focus. Grants a player-wide flat +1 [ICON_Faith] Faith; Great Prophet points are +1 flat and +1 per Holy Site district; +30% [ICON_Faith] Faith; and +10 Religious Strength in theological combat for all religious units. Faith-purchased units and buildings refund 80% of that Faith cost as Gold. After switching, gain +16% to all yields for half your current cooldown.

Adopt Sayahime's role focus. Grants a player-wide flat +1 [ICON_Culture] Culture; Great Artist, Great Writer, and Great Musician points are each +1 flat and +1 per LALALAI Troupe district; +20% [ICON_Culture] Culture; and +30% Tourism. Recruiting a Great Person grants a random Inspiration for a currently unlockable civic. After switching, gain +16% to all yields for half your current cooldown.

Adopt Hoshino Ruby's role focus. Grants +5 [ICON_Strength] Combat Strength and +1 Movement to all units; a player-wide flat +1 [ICON_Production] Production and +1 Great General point, plus +1 [ICON_Production] Production and +1 Great General point for each Encampment district. Defeating enemy units grants [ICON_Faith] Faith equal to 80% of their Cost. After switching, gain +16% to all yields for half your current cooldown.
Sayahime mode triggered: random Inspiration granted for {1}.
Hoshino Ai mode triggered: refunded {1_num} [ICON_Gold] Gold.
Reasoning Master triggered: random Eureka granted for {1}.
Hoshino Ruby mode triggered: gained {1_num} [ICON_Faith] Faith.
Switched to {1}. This mode is now on cooldown for {2_num} turn(s); +16% to all yields lasts {3_num} turn(s).
Mode switch unavailable. {1_num} turn(s) of cooldown remaining.
Akane mode switching is not available for this player.
+2 [ICON_Culture] Culture from each adjacent Entertainment Complex.
+2 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent City Center.
+1 [ICON_Science] Science from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+2 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+2 [ICON_Gold] Gold from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+2 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+2 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Production] Production from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
+1 [ICON_Faith] Faith from each adjacent LALALAI Troupe.
